posts.author: Yash (Yash Chaudhari)
posts.cookedHtml:
Create an update takes parent_id as an input.
In API doc it is mentioned that:
parent_id: The parent update identifier. This can be used to create a reply to an update.

Even if we provide invalid value to this API accepts it & creates an update.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Yash!

Our R&D team will be taking care of this soon.

Cheers,
Matias
